arts.ttl: Weekend acca predictions: Five teams to back across Europe on Sunday
arts.sum: It’s another typically busy Sunday of action across some of Europe’s top leagues and William Maxwell has put together our five-team accumulator.

arts.ttl: Roberto De Zerbi – ‘Strasbourg seem more difficult than Lyon’
